Pro savings on garage storage and tools

LCDR Maddox,

Get your garage organized for less this month. As a Lowe's for Pros member, you unlock exclusive pricing on storage systems, power tools, and job-site essentials.

Top picks this week:
• Gladiator® 6-ft. GearTrack® Pack — $189 (save $40)
• DEWALT 20V MAX* Cordless Drill/Impact Combo Kit — $199 (save $50)
• Husky 52-in. 11-Drawer Mobile Workbench — $499 (save $100)
• CRAFTSMAN 26-Gallon Vertical Air Compressor — $279 (save $70)

Shop online or in-store with your Pro account to apply savings automatically. Free delivery on orders $500+.

Weekend project deals near San Diego

LCDR Maddox,

Long weekend coming up? Tackle that project list with deals at your San Diego area Lowe's stores.

This weekend only (Oct 5–7):
• 20% off select VERSASTACK™ storage systems
• $30 off Milwaukee M18 FUEL™ 1/2" Hammer Drill (reg. $199)
• BOGO 50% off all Husky hand tools
• $10 off $50+ on paint & stain — perfect for exterior touch-ups

Your closest stores:
• Lowe's of San Diego – 3355 Sports Arena Blvd
• Lowe's of Chula Vista – 865 E H St
• Lowe's of Oceanside – 440 College Blvd

Show your Pro badge or use your registered phone number at checkout. Weekend hours: 6 AM – 10 PM.
